## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Security-related change

## Validation

- [ ] `pio run` succeeds
- [ ] Hardware test performed (if applicable)
- [ ] Serial logs attached (if behavior changed)

## Hardware Context (if applicable)

- Board:
- PN532 mode (SPI/I2C/UART):
- Tag type:
- Upload/Monitor settings:

## Checklist

- [ ] No production secrets were committed
- [ ] README updated (if needed)
- [ ] Backward compatibility considered
